instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `banner` that selects icon and CSS class from `kind` (success, error, info) and renders a paragraph with nested body content via `<#nested>`. Unknown kinds default to info styling.
code:
<#-- Macro: banner(kind) with nested message body --> <#macro banner kind="info"> <#assign cssKind = kind?lower_case> <#if cssKind != "success" && cssKind != "error" && cssKind != "info"> <#assign cssKind = "info">
<#nested>
